text: Right now, three times a day, every

After a meal, that motorway suddenly

GLUT4. Imagine thousands of tiny loading

When your muscles physically contract,

conducted at Ritsumeikan University,
compared three conditions: sitting after
a glucose load, a 10-minute walk
immediately after, and a 30-minute walk
starting 30 minutes after. The result
was not what the researchers expected.
The 10-minute walk immediately after the
meal produced a significantly lower peak
glucose level than sitting. And the
30-minute delayed walk did not. Because
by the time the 30-minute walkers began
moving, the spike had already happened.
The glucose had already peaked.
The arterial damage was already
underway. They were mopping the floor

10-minute walk intercepted the spike
before it could form.
